figures.caption: Table 5.1: Overall performance comparison. Bold indicates the best result for each metric within each group.

Figure 5.3: Qualitative comparison on a representative test patch. From top to bottom: reconstructed field Ŷ , zoomed view of the red-boxed region, error map Ŷ − Y , and zoomed error map. RMSE (◦C) is shown in the top-left corner of each prediction panel.
Table 5.2: Effect of sampling steps on reconstruction quality. Bold indicates the best result of each model; † denotes the native (non-DDIM) sampling schedule.
Figure 5.1: Global distribution of training and test tiles. Color indicates the number of patches per tile (viridis colormap); test tiles are shown in red.
